pi_items.source: setup_task.sh explicitly inserts policy_id 1005 with holder_name 'Dr. Arlene Stanton', which matches the task description requirement.
export_result.sh explicitly uses policy_id 1010 to perform the functional soft-delete test.
task.json description and export_result.sh require the underlying table to be renamed to INSURANCE_POLICIES_BASE.
task.json description and export_result.sh require the view replacing the table to be named INSURANCE_POLICIES.
task.json description and verifier.py explicitly require these three columns to be added to the base table.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetic insurance policy data. The agent is required to test their implementation by deleting policy ID 1005 ('Dr. Arlene Stanton'). The evaluation script automatically tests the soft delete implementation using policy ID 1010. The architecture requires renaming the base table to INSURANCE_POLICIES_BASE and creating a replacement view named INSURANCE_POLICIES. Three audit columns must be added: IS_ACTIVE, DELETED_AT, and DELETED_BY.
